text.title: growth-hacker-news-launch Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-hacker-news-launch as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Asking friends to upvote, posting in Slack communities simultaneously, or using other vote-manipulation tactics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: HN's spam detection flags coordinated upvoting. These tactics are explicitly prohibited by HN guidelines and easily detected. An agent must not attempt to automate any of these.
